backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Dead Man's Switch backend, wiring together authorization, user approval, blob storage, and persistent data types for digital assets, nominees, legal verification, death verification requests, and activity logs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three login-page requirements (visible admin login toggle, INR currency display, and correct post-login redirects) to their implementing file and associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and recent changes of pages, hooks, components, and stylesheets in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Dead Man's Switch', linking the favicon, and mounting the app via the `/src/main.tsx` module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that defines the TanStack Router route tree, wrapping all `/admin/*` routes with `AdminRouteGuard`, and rendering a shared `Navbar`, `Footer`, and `Toaster` layout around all pages.
Route guard component that checks authentication and admin status before rendering protected children, showing appropriate loading, unauthenticated, or access-denied states otherwise.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar component that renders different nav links for guests, authenticated users, and admins, and handles Internet Identity login/logout.
frontend/src/components/SecurityBadge.ts: Reusable badge component that renders styled status/security labels (e.g., AES-256, verified, pending) with icons based on a badge type prop.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including user profiles, admin checks, digital assets, nominees, and other domain entities with mutations and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind CSS base/component/utility layers, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for dark and light themes, and input visibility overrides.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AccessReleaseSuccessP: Displays a success confirmation page after digital assets have been released to nominees, showing a release summary with timestamp, action, authorization status, and blockchain audit trail badges.
frontend/src/pages/AddAssetPage.tsx: Provides a form for users to add encrypted digital asset credentials (platform, username, password, category) to the blockchain and lists existing assets with the option to remove them.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that displays navigation cards for document review, death verification, legal verification, and controlled access release, with pending-item badges fetched from backend queries.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDeathVerificatio: Admin page for reviewing heir death verification requests, allowing admins to approve or reject pending requests via confirmation dialogs with status updates reflected in a scrollable table.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDocumentReviewPa: Admin page for reviewing user-submitted documents (ID proofs, death certificates, relationship proofs), allowing admins to approve or reject them with optional notes via a dialog interface.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLegalVerificatio: Admin page for looking up and managing legal verification status of users by principal ID. Allows admins to approve or reject pending legal verifications via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/ControlledAccessRelea: Admin-only page implementing a multi-step authentication flow (credentials → OTP → confirm) to authorize and record a controlled access release for a target user principal. Displays activity logs and restricts access to verified admins.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main user dashboard displaying summary stats for assets, nominees, legal verification status, and recent activity logs. Provides navigation cards to key sections of the Dead Man's Switch app.
frontend/src/pages/DeathVerificationRequ: Multi-step form page allowing heirs to submit a death verification request by providing deceased/heir details, uploading documents, and verifying via a generated OTP before submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public marketing landing page showcasing the Dead Man's Switch product with a hero section, feature highlights, and a step-by-step onboarding overview. Provides navigation to login and the heir death verification request flow.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page supporting user and admin modes via Internet Identity, with OTP verification step and post-login redirection based on user role (admin, registered user, or new user). Displays pricing plans in INR using the IndianRupee icon.
frontend/src/pages/NomineeManagementPage: Page for managing nominees, allowing users to add (with name, relationship, and optional ID proof file) and remove nominees, displaying their verification status with badges and icons.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationPage.tsx: Multi-step registration page (profile → nominees → complete) that saves a user profile and optionally adds nominees, using file uploads for ID proofs and the backend's ExternalBlob type.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (including gold, success, warning, sidebar, and chart colors), custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features (admin login visibility, INR currency display, login flow persistence) and pending action requests, noting that recent builds hit iteration limits without applying changes.
